name: @inky/db
description: Inky's Phase 6 data layer — Drizzle schema (tenants, installations, configs, channels, runs, billing) and the Config↔DB mapping that lets the multi-tenant worker build a core Config from rows.
//exports: Internal-monorepo source export (mirrors @inky/core): tsx/tsc resolve the .ts directly so dependents (apps/ingest) typecheck/test without a build step.
